final:
module divide_by_2 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
        data_out <= data_in >> 1; // Divide by 2
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= data_in & 8'b11111110;
    end
  end

endmodule
